visual_summary: A TextReveal Demo is a reusable UI component that reveals text. It's used when you want to add a text reveal effect to your application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Text Reveal Demo
Description: A TextReveal Demo is a reusable UI component that reveals text. It's used when you want to add a text reveal effect to your application.
Style: magicui
Interactions: animated
Tags: magicui, text-reveal, demo

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { TextReveal } from "@/registry/magicui/text-reveal"

export default function TextRevealDemo() {
  return <TextReveal>Magic UI will change the way you design.</TextReveal>
}
